# cloudfly_snapshot (Resource)

Manages a CloudFly instance snapshot.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `os_distro` (String)
- `size` (Number)
- `size_in_gb` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
